creator: no-reply-expected@phinetworksystems.co.uk
text:
That was my thinking too.
I'm about to upgrade that server to 13.1 in the process ossec-hids-server-3.7.0_1 will get removed and re-installed. 

If local_rules.xml stays this time then yes it's fixed and that was the reason it got toasted this (last!!) time.

Like I said I'm unfamiliar with the detailed workings of the pkg-ng system and it's scripts. 

Thanks for confirming Dominik. Do you want to close this and I'll open a new one if it does it again?
Or can this stay open till I confirm? I should be doing the upgrade in the next 72 hours.
